title: • Handbook co-authorship: $2K (or 50% royalty)
content:
• Handbook co-authorship: $2K (or 50% royalty)
  • Total: $16K–$20K (retroactive; scales with grant success)

    • ---

    Why Now



    • You’re heading to the Carolinas for deep creative work
    • This is the generative moment to define a narrative methodology that will impact future artists

    ---

    Immediate Next Step



    1. Read and sit with this proposal
    2. Schedule a 45-minute call after your retreat:
      • Walk through system concept
      • Show 5-minute working prototype
      • Discuss your dramaturgical questions

    This is a chance to establish the first methodology for participatory narrative that preserves coherence while enabling collective agency.

    Interested in being first?

    —[Your Name]

    ---

    Text Message Version
